ABOUT.

Locally Owned & Family Operated — Windsor, ON

Locally Owned & Family Operated

Our Story

Born in Windsor in 2017, On A Roll is more than a restaurant — it's a vibe. We took two things nobody thought to combine — premium sushi and gourmet sliders — and made them inseparable.

Add live music, handcrafted cocktails, and a room that pulses with energy, and you have something the city had never seen before. From day one, our mission has been simple: bring people together over food that surprises them, in a space that feels alive.

We're proud to be locally owned and operated — rooted in Windsor, built for Windsor, and grateful every night for the community that keeps rolling with us.

Est. 2017
The Concept

Who Knew Sushi & Sliders
Went So Well Together?

We did. On A Roll was built on the idea that the best nights out shouldn't force a choice. Whether you're deep in a specialty roll or biting into a smash burger slider, you're in the right place. The vibe is electric, the playlist is curated, and every dish is made to be shared — or savoured solo. No rules. Just good food, good music, and good people.

Craft

Our Craft

01

The Rolls

Over 40 specialty and classic rolls, crafted fresh daily with premium fish and inventive flavour combinations.

02

The Sliders

10 slider varieties — from wagyu smash to lobster roll — served in threes and built to pair.

2017

Established in Windsor
